title: Summarize Academic Lecture with Key Concepts
scenario: Write a prompt to summarize an academic lecture. The target output should include the lecturer's name, title, main points, and key concepts. The output should be in a formal tone and include relevant keywords. Limit the prompt to 150 words.
constraints: Must include the lecturer's name and title
Must have at least 3 main points and key concepts
Must be written in a formal tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the lecturer's name and title are included
Assess if the main points are accurate and concise
Evaluate if the key concepts are relevant and helpful
